_comment: Grandfathered host<->device transfer sites (ADR-0012 / tools/lint_host_device_transfers.py). Monotonically DECREASING: removing a transfer shrinks this; a NEW one not here and not at a boundary FAILS the gate. Regenerate with `python -m tools.lint_host_device_transfers --update-baseline`. Keys are (relpath::scope::kind) — structural, not line numbers.
